issues.description: GiveDon action is incorrect for this effect. The card effect states 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck' which means searching/adding a DON card from deck to hand/board, not giving DON counters. Should use SearchDeck or similar mechanism to add DON card from deck.
Rest action targets 'Self' but should target the DON card that was just added/searched. Target scope should reference the added DON card, not the card with this effect.
Extraneous second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and PlaySelf action. No such mechanic exists in the official card text. This should be removed entirely.
